details.description:
Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2; 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

amenities.other: A/C, Stainless steel appliances, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Beautiful 1.5 bedroom apartment available in south Williamsburg, great quiet location. Nice renovation!
- 1 bedroom + home office (could also be just a regular 1 bedroom) - Hardwood floors - Stainless steel appliances
This is the ideal opportunity to live in one of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Walk in to a spacious living area with an open kitchen and plenty of dining space. Large bedroom closet. Heat and hot water is included so no need to mind the thermostat. Enjoy a multitude of cafes in your community. Located just a few blocks to Williamsburg Smorgasburg/Flea Market. Cut your commute time to the city with the J, M, Z trains minutes from your door. Bring your small furry friends ? the building allows pets!
Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Domino Park, Williamsburg Bridge, etc nearby.
June 1 move in Small pets welcome Heat and hot water included

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive!
Fabulous 2 bedroom in a classic prewar Williamsburg building. Fully renovated with gorgeous hardwood floors and tons of natural light streaming in. Big living room! Recently renovated. On-site super.
You?ll love living in this vibrant, lively neighborhood with all the necessities right outside your door and steps away from hotspots like Baby?s All Right, Bembe and Rabbit Hole, Williamsburg Bridge, Domino Park, Seawolf, etc. Commuting is quick and easy with a short distance to the Marcy JMZ.
Available June 1 Small pets OK!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Beautiful 1 bed / 1 bath apartment in East Williamsburg, prime location! This apartment features spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Roberta?s, Sweet Science, Honey?s, Wayward Social, Syndicated, Guadalupe, Reclamation, Ichiran, Momo Sushi Shack, El Cortez.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the G train, and a short walk to the L train.
July 1 move in Small pets welcome No broker fee

details.description: Lovely two bedroom apartment located in the heart of Bushwick. The apartment features hardwood floors throughout and a renovated kitchen with stainless steal appliances and butcher block bar/island. The large bedrooms have plenty of natural light to start your morning off right. The building is pet friendly and has laundry facility in the basement so no need to haul those heavy laundry bags. Great location just one block from Maria Hernandez Park, Jefferson L train stop and surrounded by popular taverns and cafes. No fee!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description: Virtual Tour Available! Beautiful 1.5 BR/1bath apartment in fabulous Bushwick!This apartment is in the pindrop-quiet "rear" building of this unique courtyard complex! It's like your own little treehouse in the middle of Bushwick. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.No brokers fee!Only First; SecurityContact to schedule your appointment today!

details.description:
Flexible Layout ? 2 Bed / 2 Bath in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Spacious and versatile, this unique apartment offers two large bedrooms and two full bathrooms with a central hallway kitchen?ideal for roommates, a couple, or anyone needing extra space. Use it as a massive 1-bedroom with home office, two separate studios with private entrances, or a true 2-bedroom (note: no shared living room).
Enjoy north and south exposures, two entrances, and unbeatable convenience?just minutes from Trader Joe?s, Macy?s, and major subway lines.
Flexible layout. Prime location. Endless possibilities.

details.description:
77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C

details.description:
Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

details.description:
Beautifully designed, spacious 1-bedroom duplex with a large open basement. This home features central heat and A/C, exposed brick throughout, hardwood floors, and generous closet space. Building amenities include laundry on site and a shared backyard. Located in vibrant Bed-Stuy, just a short walk to the Gates Ave (J/M/Z) and Utica Ave (A/C) trains.

details.description:
Amazing location blocks from Prospect Park in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Feel the history of Brooklyn on brownstone-lined streets and in locally owned bars, restaurants, coffee shops and more. Not only will you have the chance for somewhat of a city escape, but you will still have everything you need around you with full size grocers, pharmacies, bodegas, liquor stores, retail shops, tattoo shops, whatever your heart desires! You won't be miss out on any luxuries inside your new home at The Ballgreen Complex either! Fully equipped with all a renter could need in NYC. Come on by and take a look with us!
Conveniently located off the 2, 5, and Q trains, as well as the B12, B35, B44, and B49 bus lines.

details.description:
Gorgeous Duplex off Broadway Junction ACE L JZ Trains! Two floors of a private home including a Private Yard and in Unit Laundry!
This apartment has Heat and Hot water included and you only pay for electricity.
Upstairs is a King Sized bedroom and a Full Sized Bedroom with entrance to yard. Downstairs has two large living room areas and access to the yard also.
You can get to Bushwick and Bed Stuy in minutes. A lot of shopping and supermarkets, cafes in the area! Pets okay. Please Text me today!

Introducing a brand new luxury building located in the charming Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO! Indulge in breathtaking views spanning both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Immerse yourself in the abundance of nearby parks, including John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park, and many more. Delight in the long-established, delectable local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee, while still satisfying those late-night cravings at spots we all secretly adore (*cough Shake Shack), just a few blocks away. Experience the perfect blend of old-school Brooklyn charm and modern luxury living, and prepare to fall in love with your new home here.
Convenience is key, as the building is conveniently located near the A, C, and F trains, as well as the B57, B62, and B69 bus routes.
Unit Features: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen with Dishwasher; Microwave Central A/C; Heat Private Balconies available upon inquiry In-unit laundry available upon inquiry
Building Features: Rooftop Deck Laundry Room Fitness Center Recreation Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Bike Storage Pets Allowed First; Security deposit required No broker fee!
Come and experience the epitome of luxury living in this exceptional new building. Don't miss out on this opportunity to make it your new home.

details.description:
Welcome to the brand new luxury building located in the charming Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO! Indulge in breathtaking views of both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Explore the numerous nearby parks, including John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park, and many more! Treat yourself to the delightful offerings of local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee, and for those late-night cravings, you'll find beloved spots like Shake Shack just a few blocks away. This residence combines the classic essence of old-school Brooklyn with the allure of modern luxury living, making it the perfect place to call home.
Convenience is key, as the building is situated near the A, C, and F train lines, as well as the B57, B62, and B69 bus routes.
Unit features include:
Hardwood floors Stainless steel kitchen appliances Dishwasher and microwave Central air conditioning and heating Private balconies (inquire for availability) In-unit laundry (inquire for availability)
Building amenities encompass: Courtyard Roof deck Elevator Laundry room Fitness center Recreation room Tenant lounge Package room Bike storage Pet-friendly accommodations To secure your new home, all you need is the first month's rent and a security deposit. Best of all, there is no broker fee involved!
Experience the epitome of luxury living in a prime location. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity!

details.description:
? One Fifty Lawrence ? Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Welcome to One Fifty Lawrence, a modern 25-story tower redefining Brooklyn living. Nestled between Fulton and Willoughby Streets, this striking new residence blends refined design, thoughtful amenities, and unbeatable convenience ? just steps from the Jay St?MetroTech subway hub.
Inside, discover bright studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments with expansive windows, high ceilings, and sleek finishes. Each home is crafted for comfort and style, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, in-unit laundry, and energy-efficient systems.
Residents enjoy access to an impressive amenity collection: a state-of-the-art fitness center, rooftop terrace with sweeping skyline views, resident lounge, and co-working spaces ? all within a pet-friendly community.
At One Fifty Lawrence, you?re surrounded by everything Downtown Brooklyn offers ? premier shopping, dining, and cultural destinations ? while being minutes from Manhattan and the rest of the borough.
Modern design. Urban energy. Unmatched convenience. This is One Fifty Lawrence.

details.description:
Virtual tours available!
Do not miss out on this 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Brooklyn's up and coming neighborhood Prospect Lefferts Gardens! People forget that Brooklyn is the biggest borough and offers some of the best, historic architecture. Enjoy the neighborhood's easy access to the B,Q,2,3 lines, a number of bus lines, and short walk to Prospect Park. Live within steps to juice bars, grocery stores, restaurants, coffee shops, bars, pharmacies, banks, local bakeries, and more to explore. Brooklyn Greenery, MIdwood Flats, Irv's, Bluebird, Blessings, and Food Sermon are just a couple of the many options to check out in this vibrant neighborhood.Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods.
No fee 6/1 move in

details.description:
Elevated Living at 527 Grand Ave in Prospect Heights
2 bedroom with 2 bath
Welcome to 527 Grand Ave, a luxury community perfectly nestled in the vibrant Prospect Heights neighborhood. Offering 1 and 2 bedroom residences with spacious layouts, premium finishes, and thoughtful design, this property redefines modern living. Tons of natural sunlight throughout.
Residents enjoy unparalleled amenities, including: - A state-of-the-art fitness center - Expansive rooftop terrace with stunning skyline views - Dedicated children?s playroom - Business conference room for remote work and meetings - Convenient elevator access
Neighborhood Highlights: Prospect Heights is a blend of historic charm and contemporary culture. Stroll down tree-lined streets to uncover trendy restaurants, cozy cafes, and boutique shops. The iconic Prospect Park, Brooklyn Botanic Garden, and Brooklyn Museum are just steps away, offering lush green spaces and endless cultural experiences. Excellent transit options, including the A and C trains, make commuting to Manhattan and other parts of Brooklyn a breeze.
Live where convenience meets character. Schedule your tour today and make 527 Grand Ave your new home!

Enjoy the neighborhood's easy access to the B,Q,2,3 lines, a number of bus lines, and short walk to Prospect Park. Live within steps to juice bars, grocery stores, restaurants, coffee shops, bars, pharmacies, banks, local bakeries, and more to explore. Brooklyn Greenery, MIdwood Flats, Irv's, Bluebird, Blessings, and Food Sermon are just a couple of the many options to check out in this vibrant neighborhood.Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C

details.description: Virtual tours available!Beautiful 3 BR / 2 bath double duplex apartment with balcony; in unit W/D in Williamsburg, prime location!This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby's All Right, Patrizia's, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold. Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short distance to the JMZ trains

amenities.other: Central A/C, Dishwasher, Duplex, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
----- Luxury STUDIO, available now ------
Housed in what was formerly known as the Empire State Dairy Company, The Highland is one of Brooklyn?s most recent landmarked buildings. Steeped in rich history, The residence now spans 14 stories and offers Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom homes.
Our units feature ? Modern Elegant Kitchens ? Quartz Countertops ? Stainless Steel Appliances ? Panelized Dishwashers ? In-unit washer/dryer ? Floor- to- ceiling windows ? White Oak Flooring ? Mini split heating/cooling system
Bathroom features include ? White Oak Vanities ? Floor-to-ceiling grooved ceramic wall tiles ? Deep soaking tub ? Stone style floor tiles
Our building features ? Laundry room ? Bike Storage ? Resident Lounge ? Business Center ? Kids Playroom ? Fitness Center ? Rooftop Lounge ? Two Outdoor Terraces
Located just south of Highland Park, Cypress Hills is home to passionate individuals who share a strong appreciation for their neighborhood due to its rich and vibrant history, local bars, restaurants, and cafes, and community gardens, parks, and green spaces. Boasting 101 acres, Highland Park is situated on a high plateau and offers stunning views of the Ridgewood Reservoir, Rockaways, and Atlantic Ocean. Additional parks and green spaces include Shirley Chisholm State Park, Hamilton Beach Park, Sperandeo Brothers Playground, the Herbal Garden of East New York, George Walker Jr. Park, Martin Luther King Jr. Playground, Grace Playground, Noakhali Cricket Field, and Sutter Ballfields.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Experience Brooklyn?s newest modern residences at The Rocklyn, coming soon to the heart of Fort Greene. Designed for contemporary living, these sophisticated homes offer premium finishes, sleek design, and top-tier amenities in a prime location.
Elevated Living, Thoughtfully Designed
? Expansive layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows for abundant natural light ? European white oak flooring for a warm, timeless aesthetic ? Caesarstone quartz countertops paired with designer cabinetry ? High-end stainless steel appliances for a seamless culinary experience ? Spa-inspired bathrooms featuring backlit LED mirrors Unmatched Location; Convenience
Nestled in Fort Greene, The Rocklyn is just steps from renowned dining, premier shopping, and multiple subway lines, ensuring effortless city access.

details.description:
Beautiful 3BR/1bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location!
This 3 bedroom apartment features a spacious living room, queen sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods.

Nestled right between Morningside Park and St Nicholas Park, this West Harlem location is pretty hard to beat! A perfect blend of convenience and community with new independent coffee roasters, must-have shopping destinations, and the historic Apollo theater all sharing a block right in your backyard!Conveniently located off the A, B, C, D, 1 and 2 trains, as well as the M2, M3, M4, M7, M10, and M104 bus routes. Wow! You can truly get anywhere, not that you'll want to leave ;)Hardwood FloorsStainless Steel KitchenDishwasher; MicrowaveCentral A/C; HeatPet Friendly!First; SecurityNO FEE

amenities.other: Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Dishwasher

details.description:
Spacious 3 bed / 1 bath in the heart of Bushwick on Jefferson Ave.
This apartment features bedrooms with windows and closets, a modern kitchen with dishwasher, central air, hardwood floors, and a comfortable living area. The bathroom includes a waterfall-style feature for a clean, updated feel.
Pet-friendly and conveniently located near the L, M, J/M trains at Morgan Ave, Central Ave, and Myrtle Ave. Close to Bushwick?s best restaurants, bars, groceries, shopping, and nightlife.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description: Breathtakingly beautiful luxury 1 bedroom apartment in the environmentally friendly Parkline. Designed to satisfy LEED Gold and Energy Star standards, The Parkline has the distinction of being one of the greenest buildings in Brooklyn. Literally just a stroll from the tranquil beauty of Prospect Park and the B/Q trains for easy commute into Manhattan. Call me today and we can arrange a viewing!

Breathtakingly beautiful luxury 1 bedroom apartment in the environmentally friendly Parkline. Designed to satisfy LEED Gold and Energy Star standards, The Parkline has the distinction of being one of the greenest buildings in Brooklyn. Literally just a stroll from the tranquil beauty of Prospect Park and the B/Q trains for easy commute into Manhattan. Call me today and we can arrange a viewing!

Discover The Arcadian, Crown Heights newest luxury rental destination, where elevated design meets everyday comfort. This exceptional full-service residence offers modern homes paired with an impressive suite of indoor and outdoor amenities.
Each residence features a Frigidaire stainless steel kitchen appliance package with electric range, black quartz countertops, ceramic kitchen and bath tiles, engineered American oak wood flooring, and oversized windows that fill each home with natural light.
Enjoy a 24/7 attended lobby, on-site parking, and thoughtfully curated spaces to relax, work, and play including a state-of-the-art fitness center, yoga studio, media and game rooms, karaoke lounge, DIY workshop, and co-working suite.
Outdoors, unwind in the landscaped courtyard or on the rooftop deck with BBQ grills, or stay active on the half basketball court and pickleball court. A childrens playroom and dog run complete the lifestyle offering.
Situated along vibrant Nostrand Avenue, The Arcadian is moments from Prospect Park, Brooklyn Botanic Garden, and the 2, 5, and Q trains for effortless access across Brooklyn and Manhattan.
The Arcadian a modern haven of style, comfort, and connection in the heart of Crown Heights.
**Photos advertised are model units**
In compliance with the FARE Act, the following fees apply:
Application Fee: $20 per applicant Security Deposit: Equal to One Month's Rent One Month Rent due upfront at Lease Signing Resident is responsible for electric, HVAC, cable and internet. Lockout Fees may apply Additional Amenity Fees: $75. Offering discounted to $5 for the initial term Legal fees may apply if in default Additional optional parking fee may apply

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C

Outdoors, unwind in the landscaped courtyard or on the rooftop deck with BBQ grills, or stay active on the half basketball court and pickleball court. A childrens playroom and dog run complete the lifestyle offering.
Situated along vibrant Nostrand Avenue, The Arcadian is moments from Prospect Park, Brooklyn Botanic Garden, and the 2, 5, and Q trains for effortless access across Brooklyn and Manhattan.
The Arcadian a modern haven of style, comfort, and connection in the heart of Crown Heights.
**Photos advertised are model units**
In compliance with the FARE Act, the following fees apply:
Application Fee: $20 per applicant Security Deposit: Equal to One Month's Rent One Month Rent due upfront at Lease Signing Resident is responsible for electric, HVAC, cable and internet. Lockout Fees may apply Additional Amenity Fees: $75. Offering discounted to $5 for the initial term Legal fees may apply if in default Additional optional parking fee may apply

details.description:
Extra large corner unit 1 bedroom apartment brimming with charm in a prime location. Hardwood floors, oversized windows, and original exposed brick throughout offer an inspiring living space for all of your needs! The kitchen is clean with nicely finished white appliances and cabinets, and the bedroom is *king-size* with multiple windows. Great storage throughout the apartment includes two closets. Full bathroom with a tub is the cherry on top!
You'll love the incredible location on one of the most desirable BK Heights blocks. Grab a beverage at the popular Vineapple Cafe right downstairs, and then you're just steps away from Cadman Plaza Park, the Brooklyn Bridge Park+Roller Rink, and everything else in Downtown Brooklyn. Manhattan is just minutes away, with super easy via the 2, 3, and A trains, as well as the Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges. Message me to view today!

New development - amazing 1 bedroom!
Thoughtfully designed 1 bedroom 1 bath, incredible kitchen. Flexible to have either a dishwasher -OR- washer and dryer in the unit.
Apartment features: - queen sized bedroom - massive windows, tons of natural light - hardwood floors - central AC - option for either unit washer; dryer or dishwasher - beautiful kitchen w/ stone countertops and kitchen island, stainless steel appliances
Nestled in the heart of East Flatbush, the area surrounding 3509 Farragut Road offers a classic Brooklyn residential experience defined by quiet, tree-lined streets and a strong sense of community. The neighborhood is celebrated for its rich cultural tapestry, particularly its vibrant Afro-Caribbean influences, which manifest in a diverse array of authentic eateries, local bakeries, and community hubs like the nearby Little Haiti cultural district. Residents enjoy a peaceful pace of life while remaining steps away from the bustling commercial corridors of Nostrand and Flatbush Avenues.
Connectivity is a hallmark of this location, with the 2 and 5 trains at Newkirk Avenue providing a direct and efficient commute into Manhattan and Downtown Brooklyn. The area perfectly balances urban convenience with outdoor recreation, sitting within easy reach of local gems like Paerdegat Park and the expansive greenery of Prospect Park. With its blend of historic charm, modern growth, and effortless transit access, this neighborhood remains one of the borough's most sought-after enclaves for those seeking a true sense of home.
Pets and guarantors welcome
